meta.purpose: Incremental official-source audit for 2026 Numata Bench Press Lot56-60. Confirmed rows are recorded here for promotion readiness only; database.json and research-candidates.json are intentionally unchanged in this safe batch.

preflight.duplicateBatchSearch: No existing Lot56 or lot56-60 research batch found before this run.

databaseUpdate.reason: This run keeps the minified canonical database untouched to avoid broad rewrite risk; confirmed rows are staged in a research-batch file for later controlled promotion.

candidateUpdate.reason: No ambiguous same-name or insufficiently identified historical findings were found in this small batch.

notes: No achievements were inferred from record symbols beyond the raw PDF marks and legend.
National, international/world, IPF/Goodlift, and APF/AAPF searches did not produce a reliable confirmed row for Lot56-60 in this pass; no candidate rows were added.
A4 layout files were not modified.
